title: daphne oleoides var. buxifolia
intro: Daphne oleoides var. buxifolia, also known as Buxina or Daphne, is a plant species belonging to the family Thymelaeaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Daphne oleoides var. buxifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and promoting wound healing. Daphne oleoides var. buxifolia is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a paste or cream for skin conditions and injuries.
